A wild boar stands next to a rough tree stump in a dense forest, repeatedly grinding and sharpening its long curved tusks against the hard wood. Small wood particles and dust scatter from the stump with each movement. The boar moves its head side to side with force while scraping the tusks. Soft morning sunlight shines through the forest trees, creating light rays and shadows on the ground. Cinematic realistic style, detailed fur texture, natural forest environment, dynamic motion, immersive atmosphere. | camera moves to the right showing, A fox walks through the forest path and notices the wild boar sharpening his tusks, the fox looks around nervously with exaggerated fear, pretending to search for a hidden enemy, mischievous expression, cinematic medium shot. | the camera moves to left, The boar ignores the fox completely and continues grinding his tusks against the tree stump with focus and determination, close-up on the sharp tusks scraping the wood, tense forest ambience.
